test.name: TC_IKEA_004

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/teerapong.c/Desktop/Cam_Group_6/testcases/../result_log/browser/traces/temp/b80e222c-2ccb-4d74-8b3d-8bc1ff57b126"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.ikea.com/th/th/

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=ikea-search-input at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'โคมไฟ BARLAST บอร์ลัสต์' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Keyboard Key
kw.doc: Press a keyboard key on the virtual keyboard or set a key up or down.

kw.name: Debug
Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: product_list_page.Click increase amount
Click
kw.msg: TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button[aria-label="Increase quantity button"]').first()
